visual_description: The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful musical score. A low, pulsing electronic beat creates a rhythmic and ominous atmosphere, suggesting a quiet but imminent confrontation. The video opens on a medium close-up of a man in a dimly lit, dark environment. He is wearing a dark jacket over a collared shirt, and a small, rectangular name tag is visible on his chest. His expression is serious and focused as he looks slightly off-camera. In the background, the out-of-focus figures of other people are visible, suggesting he is part of a group. The camera slowly zooms in, tightening the focus on his determined face. The camera continues to zoom in, shifting focus to a second man. This man has longer, wavy dark hair and a somber, intense gaze. The lighting is low, casting deep shadows and highlighting the contours of his face. A bright, out-of-focus light source, possibly a flashlight, creates a lens flare effect in the upper right of the frame. The background remains dark and indistinct, keeping the attention on the two men and their tense interaction. The Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in the top right corner of the screen. The camera is static, holding a close-up on the man
